specFidelityNotes: Diff e4a1a6ba..bd9a9696 (#470). backfill_analytics_history walks revenue→live→product→catalog by ascending date, skips completed partitions via AnalyticsBackfillPartitionsRepo.is_complete, pauses on should_stop() with stopped_reason=budget and finish('budget') without mark_complete on in-flight partition. validate_buckets rejects Ads/A-26/A-27/A-33; shop_id required UUID on orchestrator + CLI. Two-run mocked-partner test proves budget mid-window resume without re-fetching completed dates. MODULE.md operator command documented; multi-day A-36/A-29 batching deferred to one-day primitives per issue assumption.

convention_notes.note: Operator CLI snippet and programmatic backfill_analytics_history entry documented with budget≠complete caller contract.
